description: Capabilities document whose supported_signature_algorithms does not contain 'ed25519'. RFC-ACDP-0001 §5.10 mandates ed25519 support for every conformant registry; the schema enforces this via `contains: { const: "ed25519" }` (acdp-capabilities.schema.json line 36). A consumer fetching a capabilities document missing 'ed25519' MUST reject it as schema_violation and MUST NOT proceed with operations against this registry (RFC-ACDP-0007 §3 normative validation checklist).

expected.consumer_action: MUST NOT proceed with the operation that required fetching capabilities (e.g. publish, retrieval against this registry); SHOULD log the missing mandatory algorithm for operator review.
expected.rationale: ed25519 is the only mandatory-to-support algorithm in v0.1.0. A registry that does not advertise it cannot interoperate with v0.1.0 producers; treating its capabilities as valid silently masks the problem until the first publish fails.
